mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, t1.report_count, t1.report_type, t2.task_code, t4.product_id product_id1, t4.sample_name, t1.count_price, DATE (t1.request_date) request_date, t3.sample_id, t4.sample_code, t4.sample_name sample_name1, t4.specs, t4.outward, t4.product_id, t5.id id_item, t5.state, t6.check_item_id, t6.check_item_name, t9.specs_content, t9.check_result, t9.judge_result, t6.coordinate, t7.specs_content value, CONCAT(t7.check_basis_code, ":", t7.condition_value) label FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t1.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 ON t1.id = t5.entrust_id AND t4.id = t5.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_product_item t6 ON t5.check_item_id = t6.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_report_qualifcation t7 ON t6.check_item_id = t7.check_item_id left join test_report_record t8 on t1.id = t8.entrustment_id left join test_report_record_detail t9 on t8.id = t9.record_id and t5.check_item_id = t9.check_item_id WHERE t1.id = #{id}

SELECT t1.sample_name, t2.check_item_id, t2.check_item_name, t2.specs_content, t2.check_result, t2.judge_result FROM test_report_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record_detail t2 ON t1.id = t2.record_id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{id}

SELECT t1.id, t1.report_count, t1.report_type, t2.task_code, t4.product_id product_id1, t4.sample_name, t1.count_price, DATE (t1.request_date) request_date, t3.sample_id, t4.sample_code, t4.sample_name sample_name1, t4.specs, t4.outward, t4.product_id, t5.id id_item, t5.state, t6.check_item_id, t6.check_item_name, t9.specs_content, t9.check_result, t9.judge_result, t6.coordinate, t7.specs_content value, CONCAT(t7.check_basis_code, ":", t7.condition_value) label FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t1.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 ON t1.id = t5.entrust_id AND t4.id = t5.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_product_item t6 ON t5.check_item_id = t6.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_report_qualifcation t7 ON t6.check_item_id = t7.check_item_id left join test_report_record t8 on t1.id = t8.entrustment_id left join test_report_record_detail t9 on t8.id = t9.record_id and t5.check_item_id = t9.check_item_id WHERE t1.id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t2.task_code, t4.sample_name, t1.count_price, DATE_FORMAT(t1.request_date, '%Y-%m-%d') request_date FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t1.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id left join test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 on t1.id = t5.entrust_id and t4.id = t5.sample_id where t2.task_code is not null and t5.state = 3

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t2.id task_id, t2.task_code, t2.task_price AS countPrice, DATE_FORMAT( t1.request_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) request_date FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_report_record t6 ON t2.id = t6.task_id WHERE t2.task_code IS NOT NULL AND t2.state = 6 AND t2.report_complete = 2
and t2.task_code like CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t2.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t2.id order by t2.code desc

SELECT t2.task_code, t2.report_producer, t2.report_complete, t1.id, t2.state taskState, t2.task_price AS countPrice, DATE_FORMAT(t1.request_date, '%Y-%m-%d') request_date FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record t4 ON t1.id = t4.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.task_id WHERE t2.report_complete = 2 AND (t3.state = 3 OR t3.mid_state = 1) AND (t4.state <= 2 or t4.state is null) AND ( t2.report_producer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%') OR t2.dept_id IN ( SELECT team_id FROM test_technicist WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id FROM test_team_rel WHERE new_team_id = ( SELECT team_id FROM test_technicist WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) ) ) GROUP BY t1.id, t2.state, t2.task_price ORDER BY t2.create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t6.verifyer, t6.issuer, t1.entrust_test_type, t6.report_code, t6.type As reportType, t1.actual_price count_price, DATE_FORMAT( t1.request_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) request_date FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_report_record t6 ON t1.id = t6.entrustment_id WHERE t2.issue_report = '是' AND t6.state = 1
and t6.report_code like CONCAT('%',#{reportCode},'%')
and t2.dept_id in
#{id}
order by t6.report_code desc

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t2.id taskId, t2.task_code taskCode, t1.entrust_test_type, t6.report_code, t6.type AS reportType, t6.report_complete_time, t1.actual_price count_price, t6.operate_type As operateType, DATE_FORMAT( t1.request_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) request_date FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.id LEFT JOIN test_report_record t6 ON (t1.id = t6.entrustment_id OR t1.id=t6.entrust_id) WHERE t2.issue_report = '是' AND t6.state = 1
AND ( t6.report_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reportCode}, '%') OR t2.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reportCode}, '%') )
AND ( t2.report_producer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%') OR t2.dept_id IN ( SELECT team_id FROM test_technicist WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id FROM test_team_rel WHERE new_team_id = ( SELECT team_id FROM test_technicist WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) ) )
order by t6.report_complete_time desc
SELECT t2.alias_name FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{entrustId}
SELECT t2.id VALUE, CONCAT(t2.alias_name,t2.sample_code) label FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{entrustId}

SELECT t1.entrustment_id As entrustId, t2.id VALUE, CONCAT(t2.alias_name,t2.sample_code) label FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id in
#{id}

SELECT t1.entrustment_id As entrustId, t2.id VALUE, t2.alias_name label FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id in
#{id}

SELECT t2.id VALUE, CONCAT( t2.alias_name, t2.sample_code ) label, IFNULL(t1.report_edit_url,0) text, COUNT( t3.state ) number FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.sample_id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{entrustId} and (t3.state = 3 or t3.mid_state = 1) AND t3.task_id = #{taskId} GROUP BY t2.id, label, text HAVING number > 0

SELECT t2.id VALUE, CONCAT( t2.alias_name, t2.sample_code ) label, IFNULL(t1.report_edit_url,0) text, COUNT( t3.state ) number FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.sample_id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{entrustId} and (t3.state = 3 or t3.mid_state = 1) GROUP BY t2.id, label, text HAVING number > 0
SELECT task_code FROM test_task WHERE entrustment_id = #{entrustId}

SELECT entrustment_id As entrustId, task_code As text FROM test_task WHERE entrustment_id in
#{id}

SELECT t1.id, t2.task_code as taskCode, t2.id as taskId, t1.sample_name as sampleName, t2.task_price as countPrice, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as requestDate, DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as reportCompleteTime, t1.report_url as reportUrl FROM test_task t2 LEFT JOIN test_report_record t1 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t3 ON t3.id = t2.entrustment_id WHERE t2.report_complete = 1 AND t2.state != 144 AND t3.state != 144
and t2.task_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t2.dept_id in
#{id}
order by t2.code desc

SELECT IFNULL( t1.entrustment_id, t1.entrust_id ) id, t1.verifyer, t1.issuer, t1.task_code as taskCode, t1.report_code as reportCode, t1.sample_name as sampleName, t1.price as countPrice, DATE_FORMAT(t1.required_completion_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as requestDate, DATE_FORMAT(t1.report_complete_time,'%Y-%m-%d') as reportCompleteTime, t1.report_url as reportUrl, t1.operate_type As operateType FROM test_report_record t1 left join test_task t2 on t1.task_id = t2.id WHERE t1.state >= 3 and t1.report_complete_time is not NULL
and (t1.report_code like CONCAT('%',#{reportCode},'%') or t1.task_code like CONCAT('%',#{reportCode},'%') )
AND ( t2.report_producer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%') OR t2.dept_id IN ( SELECT team_id FROM test_technicist WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id FROM test_team_rel WHERE new_team_id = ( SELECT team_id FROM test_technicist WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) ) )
order by t1.report_code desc

SELECT t1.id as id, t1.task_code as task_code, t1.sample_name as sample_name, t1.price as count_price, t1.required_completion_time as requestDate, t1.operate_time as operateTime, t2.check_item_name as checkItemName, t2.specs_content as specsContent, t2.check_result checkResult, t2.judge_result as judgeResult FROM test_report_record as t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record_detail as t2 ON t1.id = t2.record_id WHERE t1.state !=2 and t1.id = #{id}

SELECT t1.sample_name AS sampleName, t3.sample_code As sampleCode, t3.outward_describe AS outward, t3.specs AS specs, CONCAT(t5.NAME, '、', t5.CODE) as standard FROM test_report_record AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t2 ON t2.entrustment_id = t1.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample AS t3 ON t3.id = t2.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_standard_rel AS t4 ON t4.entrustment_id = t1.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_standard_file AS t5 ON t5.id = t4.standard_id WHERE t1.id = #{id}

SELECT id AS checkItemId, check_item_name AS checkItemName, specs_content AS specsContent, check_result checkResult, judge_result AS judgeResult FROM test_report_record_detail WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT distinct t2.code FROM test_entrusted_sample_standard_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t2 ON t1.standard_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{id} and t1.sample_id=#{sampleId}

SELECT distinct CONCAT(t2.CODE, "《", t2.`name`, "》") FROM test_entrusted_sample_standard_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t2 ON t1.standard_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{id} and t1.sample_id=#{sampleId}

SELECT distinct t2.code FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t2 ON t1.standard_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrust_id = #{id} and t1.sample_id = #{sampleId} and t1.state >= 2

SELECT CONCAT(t3.model,t3.NAME, "（", t3.code, "）") FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t1 LEFT JOIN test_product_item_instrument_middle_rel t2 ON t1.id = t2.id_item LEFT JOIN test_instrument t3 ON t2.intrusment_id = t3.id WHERE t3.NAME IS NOT NULL AND t1.entrust_id = #{id} and t1.sample_id = #{sampleId} and t1.state >= 2

SELECT #{taskFlowId} taskFlowId, t1.entrust_id id, t3.id sample_id, t3.product_id, t3.sample_code, t3.alias_name sample_name1, t3.outward_describe outward, t3.specs, t1.check_item_id, t1.check_item_name, t1.id id_item, t1.origin_url, t2.coordinate, t1.task_id FROM ( SELECT * FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel WHERE entrust_id = #{entrustId} ) t1 LEFT JOIN test_product_item t2 ON t1.check_item_id = t2.check_item_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t3 ON t1.sample_id = t3.id
select * from test_report_record where id=#{id}
select * from test_report_record where entrustment_id=#{entrustId}
select * from test_report_record_mid where entrust_id=#{entrustId}
select * from test_report_record_mid where report_code=#{reportCode}

SELECT id, entrustment_id as entrustmentId, report_code, contract_id, entrust_id as entrustId, 1 as type, seal_report_url, applicant FROM test_report_record WHERE category = "电子章" and state >=6 and seal_report_url is NULL
SELECT id, report_code, contract_id, entrust_id as entrustId, 0 as type, seal_report_url, applicant FROM test_report_record_mid WHERE category = "电子章" and state >=6 and seal_report_url is NULL
mapper.update: update test_report_record set seal_report_url = #{sealReportUrl} where id = #{id}
update test_report_record_mid set seal_report_url = #{sealReportUrl} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select report_code from test_report_record where id IN
#{id}
